mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PROJECT p
p.PROJECT_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
mapper.insert:
SELECT project_id_seq.NEXTVAL FROM dual
INSERT INTO project( project_id, project_title, project_describe, project_identifier, status, start_date, finish_date, created_at ) VALUES( #{projectId}, #{projectTitle}, #{projectDescribe}, #{projectIdentifier}, #{status}, #{startDate}, #{finishDate}, SYSDATE - INTERVAL '9' HOUR )
